textPlain: I like the idea, but their ratings seem.. dubious at best. For example: Hyperrogue, which hit the frontpage a few times and which I can confidently say does not feature any dark patterns, is rated just 1.19 [0] on a 5 (best) to -5 (worst) scale.[0] https://www.darkpattern.games/game/18554/0/hyperrogue.html
also funny how those first 3 'dark patterns' are basically just the core appeal of the genre
